name: finance-copilot-monorepo
description: Finance Copilot & GST Invoicing — Full-Stack Monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix finance-copilot-backend" "npm run dev --prefix finance-copilot"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix finance-copilot-backend && npm run build --prefix finance-copilot-backend && npx prisma generate --schema=finance-copilot-backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --prefix finance-copilot && npm run build --prefix finance-copilot
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix finance-copilot && npm install --prefix finance-copilot-backend
